core_mechanism: a single-parameter continuous deformation that interpolates between two distinct limiting structures, unified by a more general parametrized family that recovers both endpoints as special cases
brief_reason: The abstract states that the deformation, tuned by a continuous noncommutativity/B-field parameter, 'interpolate[s] continuously between the A-model and the B-model,' with generalized complex structures providing the encompassing family that includes both endpoints as special cases.
